name: Apricot Angel Food Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 large angel food cake, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each half of the angel food cake into pieces the size of a half dollar.
2. Place one pile of cake pieces in a serving dish.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the sugar, salt, and cornstarch until combined.
4. Gradually add the apricot nectar to the dry ingredients while stirring continuously.
5. Cook the mixture over low heat until it thickens slightly.
6. Spread half of the sauce evenly over the first layer of cake pieces in the serving dish.
7. Place the remaining cake pieces on top of the sauce and pour the rest of the sauce over them.
8. Smooth the surface of the dessert with a spatula.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
10. Frost with whipped cream and sprinkle with coconut before serving.
